channel.title: BSHmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BSHmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Garmin Cirqa: What We Know So Far About the Upcoming Whoop Competitor
item.description: Expected to launch within weeks, the Garmin Cirqa represents a more lifestyle-oriented wearable from the company known primarily for serious fitness tracking devices.

item.title: Running Point Season 3 on Netflix: What the Showrunner Has Said
item.description: The showrunner of Running Point has shared an update on the possibility of a third season now that the second season has premiered on Netflix.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints and Answers for Saturday, April 25 (#1049)
item.description: Clues and solutions for the April 25 edition of NYT Connections are available for players looking to maintain their winning streak.

item.title: Quordle Hints and Answers for Saturday, April 25
item.description: Players looking for assistance with the April 25 Quordle puzzle can find hints and the day's solutions here.

item.title: Enterprise AI Adoption Requires a Fundamental Shift, Not Gradual Rollout
item.description: Just as big wave surfers required an entirely new technique rather than incremental improvement, meaningful AI adoption in enterprise settings demands a categorical change in approach.
